/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/state.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/world.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/player.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/skills.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/pets.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/tick.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/game/save.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/render/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/render/sprites.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/render/iso_spritesheet.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/render/font.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/ui/hud.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/ui/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/ui/char_create.c.o CMakeFiles/grumblequest_sim.dir/src/hal_sdl.c.o -o grumblequest_sim   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib
